recommendations.title: Ingrid Goes West
recommendations.overview: Ingrid becomes obsessed with a social network star named Taylor Sloane who seemingly has a perfect life. But when Ingrid decides to drop everything and move west to be Taylor's friend, her behaviour turns unsettling and dangerous.

recommendations.title: Seized
recommendations.overview: Hiding out with his son Taylor on the Mexican coast, Nero hopes to put his violent Special Forces career behind him. But after Nero’s home is attacked and Taylor is abducted, the mysterious Mzamo orders Nero to slaughter the members of three rival cr

recommendations.title: Interstellar: Nolan's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: A look behind the lens of Christopher Nolan's space epic.

recommendations.title: Folklore: The Long Pond Studio Sessions
recommendations.overview: An intimate concert film, in which Taylor Swift performs each song from her album 'folklore' in order, as she reveals the meaning and the stories behind all 17 tracks for the very first time.

recommendations.title: Dead Sea
recommendations.overview: Stranded in the open sea after a fatal accident, a young woman and her two friends are rescued by a fishing vessel's captain, unaware that the ship harbors a chilling secret.

recommendations.title: Shawn Mendes: In Wonder
recommendations.overview: A portrait of singer-songwriter Shawn Mendes' life, chronicling the past few years of his rise and journey.

recommendations.title: Who Can Kill a Child?
recommendations.overview: A couple of English tourists arrive at the island of Almanzora, off the Spanish Mediterranean coast, where they discover that there are no adults in a small fishing village, only some children who stare at them and smile mysteriously.

recommendations.title: Lead Me Home
recommendations.overview: Poignant stories of homelessness on the West Coast of the US frame this cinematic portrait of a surging humanitarian crisis.

recommendations.title: Gone Fishin'
recommendations.overview: Two fishing fanatics get in trouble when their fishing boat gets stolen while on a trip.

recommendations.title: Dark Days
recommendations.overview: A cinematic portrait of the homeless population who live permanently in the underground tunnels of New York City.
